description: Cursed bindings, sentience, possession, and inseparable attachments. How the item clings to you and refuses to let go.
limitations: Fused Grip
It bonds to the dominant hand like a second skin. Only powerful magic can pry it loose.
Awakening
After enough use, something stirs inside it. Opinions form. Disagreements follow. The item begins to talk back.
Victor's Chain
It locks onto its current owner until a worthy opponent falls. Only triumph earns the right to pass it on.
Coward's Bane
Turn your back on a fight and it vanishes from your hands. It does not tolerate retreat.
Peacekeeper
Start a fight and it abandons you. It will not serve an aggressor, only a defender.
Eternal Burden
It cannot be sold, traded, or discarded. The only way to be rid of it is to destroy it completely.
Willful
It has a mind of its own and acts on impulse. Sometimes it cooperates. Sometimes it has other plans.
Living Shell
It is not an item at all. It is a creature wearing the shape of one, watching and waiting.
Quest Bound
It serves a single purpose and refuses all others. Stray from the mission and the item goes inert.
Death Bond
It chose you, and only death will break the pact. No transfer, no trade, no escape while breath remains.
Cursed
Something dark lives inside it. The item clings to its owner and punishes every attempt to break free.
Dark Leash
A malicious entity watches through it. The item is a window, and something on the other side is paying attention.
Watched
Interdimensional powers monitor its every use. Misuse it and they intervene, swiftly and without mercy.
Awakened
It thinks. It watches. It has opinions about how it is used and who holds it. Not all of those opinions are friendly.
Bonded
It melds to the bearer's body at first touch. Letting go stops being an option the moment skin meets surface.
Slow Trust
It does nothing at first. The item must grow accustomed to a new bearer before it reveals what it can do.
Proving Ground
It demands to be impressed before it cooperates. Show it something remarkable, or carry dead weight.
Shadow Hunger
A quiet pull toward darkness lives inside it. Given time, it will try to drag the wielder along.
Tender Care
Mistreat it and it locks down. Speak harshly, handle it roughly, and it refuses to work until amends are made.
